experiment.name: Plutus
experiment.note: Rules frozen before first trade. Any change after start invalidates the run.

plutus.label: Plutus
plutus.tradable: any US-listed stock or ETF with a live quote at decision time; the core universe below is its priced watchlist, not a restriction

voo.label: VOO Buy & Hold
voo.note: Buys VOO on first cycle, never trades again.

momentum.label: Momentum Bot
momentum.rebalance: first run of each trading day

random.label: Random Monkey
random.rebalance: first run of each trading day

maleen.label: Maleen
maleen.method: Owner's picks, initially pre-registered 2026-07-06 as buy-and-hold (NVDA/RKLB/TSM 2:2:2, VOO 4). Owner amendment 2026-07-09: sold RKLB (realized loss), rotated proceeds equally into APLD/CIFR/IREN. The human benchmark is hereby an actively managed human portfolio; all owner trades are logged like any bot's.
maleen.note: Human benchmark — cap-exempt like the index benchmark. Owner may trade; every owner trade is executed through engine validation and logged.

copycat.label: Copycat
copycat.target: Nancy Pelosi's disclosed portfolio (STOCK Act PTRs via quiverquant.com / capitoltrades.com) — the most-copied 'best portfolio online' claim, as marketed by Autopilot ($400M mirrors it)
copycat.method: On first cycle, mirror the target's currently disclosed stock holdings (proportional weights within position caps, shares only — no options). Afterwards trade only when a NEW disclosure appears; each order's rationale must cite the disclosure with both transaction date and disclosure date so staleness is on the record.
copycat.note: Tests whether a famous claimed-best portfolio performs when copied under the exact conditions retail copiers face: public-disclosure lag, shares-only, small account. Target swappable here before day 1.

universe_note: The fixed universe below binds the momentum and random baselines (they need a defined candidate pool) and defines the priced watchlist. Plutus may trade beyond it — a fairness asymmetry accepted by design: the goal set for Plutus is to make money.
